posts.author: bearishbhaiya
posts.text: SC confirms the kill on India's online gaming industry — The government changed the GST rules in 2023 and said all online real money games, skill or not, will be taxed at 28% on the full amount players deposit. Companies like Dream11, Games24x7, and Gameskraft had been paying 18% GST only on their platform fee until then. The government also went back to 2022 and sent notices to 71 companies demanding Rs. 1.12 lakh crore in back taxes. The Karnataka High Court stepped in, said this is too harsh, quashed the notices, and gave the industry some breathing room. Today the Supreme Court reversed th…
